retry_reason: The release operation only executes if ar->fw.fw is non-NULL; if NULL it's a no-op. Once released, the object is gone and must not be used again — retrying would cause a double-release.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases the firmware reference stored in ar->fw.fw by calling release_firmware. It zeros the firmware structure to prevent further use. The caller must not access ar->fw.fw after calling this function. This function is typically called during driver cleanup to properly free firmware resources.
